first_run.rationale: The evaluations are nearly identical in score, justification, strengths, and concerns. Both correctly identify the same core mismatches: a lack of recent C++ experience, industrial automation background, and specific cybersecurity standard knowledge. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in reasoning based on the different company names.
